Notice Of Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-22-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'S Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiff's Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

The Court signed the proposed order submitted by email.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
